AutoVault User Agreement & Acknowledgment
Version 1.0 · Please read in full before continuing

Welcome to AutoVault.

AutoVault is a dealership management platform designed to help dealerships organize, store, and manage their business information in one centralized location. AutoVault is a software platform only and does not provide accounting, tax, legal, financial, or compliance services.

By signing this agreement, you acknowledge and agree to the following:

1. Responsibility for Information

You are solely responsible for all information entered into AutoVault, including but not limited to:

  • Vehicle information
  • Purchase and sale prices
  • Profit and loss calculations
  • Expenses
  • Payroll and commissions
  • Sales tax amounts
  • Registration fees
  • Flooring costs
  • CPA information
  • Financial reports
  • Customer information
  • Deal jacket information
  • Documents uploaded to the platform

AutoVault does not verify, audit, review, or guarantee the accuracy of any information entered by users.

2. Taxes and Government Filings

AutoVault is not responsible for preparing, calculating, reviewing, filing, or submitting any tax returns, sales tax reports, DMV documents, licensing documents, payroll filings, or any federal, state, or local government filings.

The dealership is solely responsible for:

  • Verifying all financial information
  • Confirming all tax amounts
  • Filing all required tax returns
  • Meeting all filing deadlines
  • Paying all taxes and fees
  • Maintaining compliance with all applicable laws and regulations

Any reminders or due dates displayed inside AutoVault are provided solely as organizational tools and should never be relied upon as official legal or tax advice.

3. No Professional Advice

AutoVault does not provide legal, accounting, bookkeeping, tax, or financial advice. Users should consult licensed professionals regarding tax filings, accounting practices, legal matters, and regulatory compliance.

4. Accuracy of Calculations

Certain reports, dashboards, and calculations within AutoVault are generated automatically based on the information entered by users.

Users agree that they are solely responsible for reviewing and verifying all reports, calculations, totals, profits, losses, taxes, commissions, expenses, and other financial information before relying on it for business decisions.

5. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, AutoVault, its owners, employees, affiliates, developers, and partners shall not be liable for any:

  • Financial losses
  • Lost profits
  • Tax penalties
  • Interest charges
  • Government fines
  • Audit findings
  • Accounting errors
  • Business interruptions
  • Data entry mistakes
  • Missed filing deadlines
  • Compliance violations
  • Indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages

arising from the use of, or inability to use, the AutoVault platform.

6. Data Responsibility

Users are responsible for maintaining accurate and current records within AutoVault. AutoVault is not responsible for incorrect, incomplete, outdated, or duplicate information entered by users.

7. Subscription Billing

By signing this agreement, you authorize AutoVault to charge your selected payment method according to your chosen subscription plan. You understand and agree that:

  • Your subscription renews automatically each billing cycle unless canceled.
  • Charges will continue until your subscription is canceled in accordance with AutoVault's cancellation policy.
  • Failure to pay may result in suspension or termination of access to the platform.

8. Availability of Service

While AutoVault strives for reliable uptime and secure data storage, uninterrupted availability cannot be guaranteed. Temporary maintenance, updates, internet outages, or unforeseen technical issues may affect access to the platform.

9. Acceptable Use

Users agree not to misuse the platform, attempt unauthorized access, upload malicious software, interfere with platform operations, or use AutoVault for unlawful purposes.

10. Updates to the Agreement

AutoVault may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use of the platform after an updated agreement becomes effective constitutes acceptance of the revised terms. Users may be required to accept updated versions before continuing to use the platform.

User Acknowledgment

By checking the box below and providing my electronic signature, I acknowledge and agree that:

  • I have read and understand this agreement.
  • I understand AutoVault is software only and not an accounting, tax, bookkeeping, legal, or compliance service.
  • I am solely responsible for verifying all information entered into AutoVault.
  • I am solely responsible for filing and paying all taxes and government filings.
  • I understand AutoVault does not guarantee the accuracy of any calculations or reports.
  • I authorize recurring billing for my selected subscription until canceled.
  • I agree to the AutoVault Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
Scroll to the end of the agreement to continue
Electronic Signature
Sign here using your mouse or finger
Date: —Recording session details…
You must accept this agreement to access AutoVault. A copy of your signed agreement is saved to your account.
Welcome to AutoVault
The first three steps to get your platform running.
1
Add all vehicles Critical
Every unit on your lot, tied to its VIN.
2
Add all sales reps & commission Critical
Set each rep’s commission so deals calculate correctly.
3
Add all expenses
Rent, payroll, flooring, marketing — everything that hits your books.
Steps 1 and 2 are critical for your system to work. AutoVault is designed so everything works together once your vehicles and sales rep commissions are added. As you mark vehicles as sold, it automatically calculates your sales rep’s commission into the deal.
1 / 5

Sales Rep Portal

Log in to manage your deals, inventory, and messages.

CPA / Accountant Portal

Secure, read-only access to live dealership financials.

You can view all reports and leave notes, but cannot edit any records.

Delete Lead

Are you sure you want to delete this lead?
This will permanently remove the lead from your pipeline. This action cannot be undone.

Convert to Customer

Convert this lead to a paid customer?
The lead will be moved to the Customers list and you will be able to track sales, commissions, and activity for this customer.

Make Editor?

Add Admin User

New admins are added as Editors — they can view and edit records, while the owner stays in control of managing users.

The VIN barcode is usually on the driver’s door jamb or the lower windshield.

Add Sales Rep

Gross = sold price − purchase price. This rate auto-fills the commission whenever this rep is chosen on a deal.
Apply this rate to all sales reps Sets every rep to the same commission rate and recalculates commissions on cars they've already sold.
Add Sales Rep Login
Create credentials for this rep. A welcome email with their temp password will be sent automatically on save.

Add Employee

Deactivate Employee

Are you sure you want to deactivate this employee?
The employee will be removed from the active payroll list. Their historical records and payment history will be preserved.

Sales Tax Filing Schedule

Filing frequency and due dates vary by state — some states have no sales tax at all. Set yours here so the dashboard reminds you when your next filing is due. The sales tax for each sale is entered per vehicle on its deal, since rates change by location/ZIP.

Filing
